mapper.insert: INSERT INTO risk_decision_log ( application_id, user_id, scorecard_score, scorecard_decision, decision_reason, feature_details, validation_errors, consistency_warnings, decision_time, create_time ) VALUES ( #{applicationId}, #{userId}, #{scorecardScore}, #{scorecardDecision}, #{decisionReason}, #{featureDetails}, #{validationErrors}, #{consistencyWarnings}, #{decisionTime}, #{createTime} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, application_id AS applicationId, user_id AS userId, scorecard_score AS scorecardScore, scorecard_decision AS scorecardDecision, decision_reason AS decisionReason, feature_details AS featureDetails, validation_errors AS validationErrors, consistency_warnings AS consistencyWarnings, decision_time AS decisionTime, create_time AS createTime FROM risk_decision_log WHERE application_id = #{applicationId}

SELECT id, application_id AS applicationId, user_id AS userId, scorecard_score AS scorecardScore, scorecard_decision AS scorecardDecision, decision_reason AS decisionReason, feature_details AS featureDetails, validation_errors AS validationErrors, consistency_warnings AS consistencyWarnings, decision_time AS decisionTime, create_time AS createTime FROM risk_decision_log WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT id, application_id AS applicationId, user_id AS userId, scorecard_score AS scorecardScore, scorecard_decision AS scorecardDecision, decision_reason AS decisionReason, feature_details AS featureDetails, validation_errors AS validationErrors, consistency_warnings AS consistencyWarnings, decision_time AS decisionTime, create_time AS createTime FROM risk_decision_log ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
